title: Youtube Poop - Hotel Mario Deleted Cutscenes
description:
20 deleted cutscenes of the infamous Hotel Mario.


-Finally, my second video done!
Sorry for the extremely long wait folks. I've been very busy with school and 
other stuff for the past 365½ days.
It took longer than expected to make this crap.
Originally this video was just suppose to be a one-week project, 
but instead it got streched out over a month.
Anyway, this video is not the result of the other project I was working on before. (Which I mentioned)
I'm still working on that other project though, and when it will be finished is still uncertain.

By the way...



you'll never find Weegee in this video!
